heading: Definitions

children.label: A
children.text: A land conservation element, the purpose of which is to control erosion and sedimentation.

children.label: i
children.text: the conservation, use, and quality of water, including irrigation and rural water supplies;

children.label: ii
children.text: the mitigation of floods and high water tables;

children.label: iii
children.text: the repair and improvement of reservoirs;

children.label: iv
children.text: the improvement of agricultural water management; and

children.label: v
children.text: the improvement of water quality.

children.label: i
children.text: the development of resources-based industries;

children.label: ii
children.text: the protection of rural industries from natural resource hazards;

children.label: iii
children.text: the development of adequate rural water and waste disposal systems;

children.label: iv
children.text: the improvement of recreation facilities;

children.label: v
children.text: the improvement in the quality of rural housing;

children.label: vi
children.text: the provision of adequate health and education facilities;

children.label: vii
children.text: the satisfaction of essential transportation and communication needs; and

children.label: viii
children.text: the promotion of food security, economic development, and education.

children.label: i
children.text: energy conservation, including the production of energy crops;

children.label: ii
children.text: the protection of agricultural land, as appropriate, from conversion to other uses;

children.label: iii
children.text: farmland protection; and

children.label: iv
children.text: the protection of fish and wildlife habitats.

children.heading: Board
children.label: 2 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Resource Conservation and Development Policy Advisory Board established under .section 3456(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: established by volunteers or representatives of States, local units of government, Indian tribes, or local nonprofit organizations to carry out an area plan in a designated area; and

children.label: B
children.text: designated by the chief executive officer or legislature of the State to receive technical assistance and financial assistance under this subchapter.

children.heading: Designated area
children.label: 4 Designated area
children.text: The term “designated area” means a geographic area designated by the Secretary to receive technical assistance and financial assistance under this subchapter.

children.heading: Financial assistance
children.label: 5 Financial assistance
children.text: The term “financial assistance” means a grant or loan provided by the Secretary (or the Secretary and other Federal agencies) to, or a cooperative agreement entered into by the Secretary (or the Secretary and other Federal agencies) with, a council, or association of councils, to carry out an area plan in a designated area, including assistance provided for planning, analysis, feasibility studies, training, education, and other activities necessary to carry out the area plan.

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 6 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in .section 5304 of title 25

children.label: A
children.text: any county, city, town, township, parish, village, or other general-purpose subdivision of a State; and

children.label: B
children.text: any local or regional special district or other limited political subdivision of a State, including any soil conservation district, school district, park authority, and water or sanitary district.

children.heading: Locally led planning process
children.label: 8 Locally led planning process
children.text: The term “planning process” means actions taken by a locally led council to develop and carry out an effective area plan in a designated area, including development of the area plan, goals, purposes, policies, implementation activities, evaluations and reviews, and the opportunity for public participation in the actions.

children.label: A
children.text: described in ; andsection 501(c) of title 26

children.label: B
children.text: exempt from taxation under .section 501(a) of title 26

children.heading: Project
children.label: 10 Project
children.text: The term “project” means a project that is carried out by a council to achieve any of the elements of an area plan.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 11 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.label: A
children.text: any State;

children.label: B
children.text: the District of Columbia; or

children.label: C
children.text: any territory or possession of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: inventorying, evaluating, planning, designing, supervising, laying out, and inspecting projects;

children.label: B
children.text: providing maps, reports, and other documents associated with the services provided;

children.label: C
children.text: providing assistance for the implementation of area plans and projects; and

children.label: D
children.text: providing services that involve the resources of Department of Agriculture programs in a local community, as defined in the locally led planning process.
